{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Whisper's door
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The inside of [[Elder]] [[Whisper's door]] is covered by a scripted mirror that functions as a spirit-trap.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
